message:
Implement enhanced bundle types and generateBundleSkillMd

- Add Bundle interface with version, updatedAt, workflow, whenToUse,
  featured, and icon fields
- Create BundleIcon type for Lucide icon names
- Add 'getting-started' bundle with workflow and usage guidance
- Implement generateBundleSkillMd() for combined SKILL.md export
- Add featuredBundles and bundlesById exports
- Update prompts/index.ts with new bundle exports

Closes jeffreysprompts.com-wxb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
